.file-embed.background: rgb(248, 250, 252) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

.internal-embed.background: rgba(248, 250, 252, 0.2) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

.internal-embed.is-loaded.background: rgba(248, 250, 252, 0.2) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

.markdown-embed.background: rgba(248, 250, 252, 0.2) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

.status-bar.background: rgb(248, 250, 252) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

.view-content.background: rgb(248, 250, 252) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

a.external-link[data-tooltip-position=\".background: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

linear-gradient(rgba(0, 0, 0, 0), rgba(0, 0, 0, 0)) repeat scroll 0% 0% / contain padding-box border-box, rgba(0, 0, 0, 0) url("data:image/svg+xmlutf8,<svg xmlns=\"http://www.w3.org/2000/svg\" width=\"24\" height=\"24\" viewBox=\"0 0 24 24\" fill=\"none\" stroke=\"currentColor\" stroke-width=\"2\" stroke-linecap=\"round\" stroke-linejoin=\"round\"><path d=\"M18 13v6a2 2 0 0 1-2 2H5a2 2 0 0 1-2-2V8a2 2 0 0 1 2-2h6\"></path><polyline points=\"15 3 21 3 21 9\"></polyline><line x1=\"10\" y1=\"14\" x2=\"21\" y2=\"3\"></line></svg>") repeat scroll 0% 0% / contain padding-box border-box
a.external-link[data-tooltip-position=\".background-image: linear-gradient(rgba(0, 0, 0, 0), rgba(0, 0, 0, 0)), url("data:image/svg+xmlutf8,<svg xmlns=\"http://www.w3.org/2000/svg\" width=\"24\" height=\"24\" viewBox=\"0 0 24 24\" fill=\"none\" stroke=\"currentColor\" stroke-width=\"2\" stroke-linecap=\"round\" stroke-linejoin=\"round\"><path d=\"M18 13v6a2 2 0 0 1-2 2H5a2 2 0 0 1-2-2V8a2 2 0 0 1 2-2h6\"></path><polyline points=\"15 3 21 3 21 9\"></polyline><line x1=\"10\" y1=\"14\" x2=\"21\" y2=\"3\"></line></svg>")
a.external-link[data-tooltip-position=\".font-family: "??", "??", ui-sans-serif, -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, system-ui, "Segoe UI", "Google Sans Flex", Roboto, "Inter Variable", Inter, "Apple Color Emoji", "Segoe UI Emoji", "Segoe UI Symbol", sans-serif

blockquote.background: rgba(102, 63, 191, 0.08) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

blockquote::before.background: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

body.--blur-background: color-mix(in srgb, #f8fafc 65%, transparent) linear-gradient(#f8fafc, color-mix(in srgb, #f8fafc 65%, transparent))
body.--raised-background: color-mix(in srgb, #f8fafc 65%, transparent) linear-gradient(#f8fafc, color-mix(in srgb, #f8fafc 65%, transparent))
body.--spoiler-pattern:
radial-gradient(circle 1px at 10px 8px, rgba(100, 100, 100, 0.6) 50%, transparent 50%),
        radial-gradient(circle 1px at 30px 2px, rgba(100, 100, 100, 0.4) 50%, transparent 50%),
        radial-gradient(circle 1px at 50px 12px, rgba(100, 100, 100, 0.7) 50%, transparent 50%),
        radial-gradient(circle 1px at 70px 6px, rgba(100, 100, 100, 0.5) 50%, transparent 50%),
        radial-gradient(circle 1px at 15px 24px, rgba(100, 100, 100, 0.6) 50%, transparent 50%),
        radial-gradient(circle 1px at 38px 28px, rgba(100, 100, 100, 0.4) 50%, transparent 50%),
        radial-gradient(circle 1px at 60px 36px, rgba(100, 100, 100, 0.7) 50%, transparent 50%),
        radial-gradient(circle 1px at 85px 22px, rgba(100, 100, 100, 0.5) 50%, transparent 50%)
body.background: rgb(248, 250, 252) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

body.styled-scrollbars.background: rgb(248, 250, 252) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

h1[data-heading=\"This is a heading 1\"].background: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0) linear-gradient(to right, rgb(200, 50, 70) 30%, rgba(0, 0, 0, 0) 70%) repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box
rgba(0, 0, 0, 0) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

h2[data-heading=\"This is a heading 2\"].background: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0) linear-gradient(to right, rgb(102, 63, 191) 30%, rgba(0, 0, 0, 0) 70%) repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box
rgba(0, 0, 0, 0) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

h3[data-heading=\"This is a heading 3\"].background: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0) linear-gradient(to right, rgb(20, 140, 80) 30%, rgba(0, 0, 0, 0) 70%) repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box
rgba(0, 0, 0, 0) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

h4[data-heading=\"This is a heading 4\"].background: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0) linear-gradient(to right, rgb(0, 120, 180) 30%, rgba(0, 0, 0, 0) 70%) repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box
rgba(0, 0, 0, 0) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

h5[data-heading=\"This is a heading 5\"].background: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0) linear-gradient(to right, rgb(30, 70, 160) 30%, rgba(0, 0, 0, 0) 70%) repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box
rgba(0, 0, 0, 0) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

h6[data-heading=\"This is a heading 6\"].background: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0) linear-gradient(to right, rgb(180, 120, 0) 30%, rgba(0, 0, 0, 0) 70%) repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box
rgba(0, 0, 0, 0) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

input.prompt-input[type=\"text\"].background: rgba(248, 250, 252, 0.5) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

input[type=\"search\"].background: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

kbd.background: rgba(102, 63, 191, 0.06) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

mark.background: rgba(220, 100, 20, 0.25) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

pre.background: rgba(102, 63, 191, 0.06) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box
